yyork doctor found issues
Required failures: zellij

Runtime requirements
  MISSING  zellij  required  yyork could not find its bundled zellij runtime or a zellij binary on PATH.
  OK       git     required  /usr/bin/git

Agent CLI availability
  OK       claude-code  optional  /Users/me/.local/bin/claude
  MISSING  codex        optional  Codex sessions are unavailable until the codex CLI is on PATH.

Next steps
  - Install a yyork package with bundled zellij, set YYORK_ZELLIJ, or put zellij on PATH.
